title: Middle Eastern Smoky Bean Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from North Africa, made with smoky beans, roasted spices, and a hint of eastern flair. Serve with crusty bread or couscous for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add smoky beans, dried apricots, white beans, cumin, coriander, and paprika.
Stir to combine and cook for 1 minute.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
